name: vscode-datalog
description: Automatically places logpoints after Polars DataFrame assignments to show row/column counts SAS-style in the Debug Console

commands.title: Datalog: Focus worklib Folder in Explorer

vscode-datalog.polarsAlias.description: The alias used for the polars import (e.g. import polars as pl)

vscode-datalog.dfNameSuffixes.description: Variable name suffixes that identify a variable as a DataFrame

vscode-datalog.enabled.description: Enable or disable automatic logpoint injection

vscode-datalog.exportSamples.description: Export the top rows of each DataFrame to a CSV file during debugging

vscode-datalog.sampleRows.description: Number of rows to write per DataFrame sample CSV

vscode-datalog.sampleOutputFolder.description: Folder name (relative to workspace root) where DataFrame sample CSVs are written

vscode-datalog.logFile.description: File name (relative to workspace root) where Datalog appends runtime DataFrame shape entries
